title: Boss Music Mod/Datapack
description: This mod adds music that will play during epic frays against both the Wither and the Ender Dragon.
body:
![Boss Music Mod](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/mod/2020/361/13329231_l.webp)

## 𝔹𝕠𝕤𝕤 𝕄𝕦𝕤𝕚𝕔 𝕄𝕠𝕕

### This is a mod/datapack with a focus on incorporating music to accompany the player during brash encounters with both the Wither and the Ender Dragon. That's about it, honestly.

### **You may adjust the volume of the music in the mod via the "Jukebox/Note Blocks" slider in Options > "Music & Sounds" in the menu in-game.**

### **You can also run two different commands that toggle the mod's boss themes.**
- **_/trigger bmm.wither_theme.toggle_** to toggle the Wither's boss theme
- **_/trigger bmm.ender_dragon_theme.toggle_** to toggle the Ender Dragon's boss theme

## Music featured within the mod:

### 84tangelo - The Wither (Theme of the Wither)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0ZdAuyYBVC4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### solunary - The "End" At Hand (Theme of the Ender Dragon)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/GAW5tuC83mE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


<details>
<summary>How to solve the "music playing at spawn" problem</summary>

You probably had **Dynamic Surroundings** installed. Don't worry, it isn't a total necessity to outright prune the mod off your modlist. Instead, you may follow these steps to resolve the issue **while still keeping Dynamic Surroundings around** - fingers crossed!
[https://docs.google.com/document/d/1T0fpHUYm9zE_luBFx0mNjUFQxZxxc6drXSR_lBbBJCc/edit?usp=sharing](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1T0fpHUYm9zE_luBFx0mNjUFQxZxxc6drXSR_lBbBJCc/edit?usp=sharing)

</details>


### Boss music replacement tutorial **(OUTDATED FOR NOW):** https://docs.google.com/document/d/1jQJIjJ9yWY6R0hKTG6p8z_hfMb_ddLc48NMnVscyels/edit?usp=sharing




<details>
<summary>AS A SIDENOTE</summary>

I have also acquired explicit permission from the authors from both tracks for usage within this mod. The following are screenshots and links provided as testimonies to corroborate.

[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0ZdAuyYBVC4&lc=UgyUg-n_RcSUyk7qcPd4AaABAg.9nZLGdYJ6bv9sEF5rYrK-7](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0ZdAuyYBVC4&lc=UgyUg-n_RcSUyk7qcPd4AaABAg.9nZLGdYJ6bv9sEF5rYrK-7)

[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GAW5tuC83mE&lc=UgzsZ2z0n4MjiXxp31d4AaABAg.9IYiAzdGgzx9sEX7KqjuCb](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GAW5tuC83mE&lc=UgzsZ2z0n4MjiXxp31d4AaABAg.9IYiAzdGgzx9sEX7KqjuCb)
